---
title: "Cite"
page-layout: full
---

## How to cite

Use package citation metadata and include version information in analysis outputs.

- [Package CITATION file (source)](https://github.com/arnabaich96/CausalMixGPD/blob/master/inst/CITATION)
- [pkgdown citation page](pkgdown/reference/index.html)

## Minimum citation guidance

- Package: `CausalMixGPD`
- Repository: `https://github.com/arnabaich96/CausalMixGPD`
- Version: report the exact package version used

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Roadmap](roadmap.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
